findings.disposition: Raw finding N1 is dispositioned by direct immutable-parent cross-checks. plan.parent_tree and the E01 display title are constant-pinned rather than repository-derived; both were confirmed against the immutable parent commit c0e4b3d156500684329a92bcb16e0609894fd738 during this qualification.

Raw finding N2 is non-gating for the exact repair: all 14 required recovery tests are live methods of CurrentAuditVerifierTests and the full discovered count is 163; stricter discovery grounding is deferred.
Raw finding N3 fails closed under any argument miswiring and the exact supplied execution paths were reviewed; stronger AST identity checks are deferred to an authorized later epoch.

Raw finding N4 is retained as an operational limitation. The raw pre-push diagnostic logs behind the execution-budget correction were not retained; the registered-verifier margin increase to 30 seconds is inferred, not exit-code attested, and the registered-test correction rests on a single exit-137 observation at 31.830 seconds.
Raw finding N5 is fail-closed and bounded to the pinned Git environment; future Git-default expansion requires an explicitly reviewed protocol update.
Raw finding N6 is recorded without identity inflation. Review capture keys prove only session-key possession and domain separation; they confer no identity, independence, or approval authority.
Raw finding N7 is resolved by representing adverse review as absence of Q and retaining only truthful success-shaped qualification records; no review record carries release authority.

Raw finding N8 is harmless fail-closed dead-state retention. Epoch 1 does not and cannot validate epoch 2; acceptance of commit dde6512d615f54fac26b2728a05b9c53dca68666 as the sole recovery rests on external retention of its exact commit and path digests and on branch/ref protection, not on any in-repository proof.

Raw finding N9 is managed by exact retained hosted logs. The 120-second registered-test exception equals the absolute container ceiling; a future duration regression in the exact CH-T001 e0002 registration has no in-protocol remedy other than suffix revocation and re-registration at the 10-second default.
This recovery confers no runtime, deployment, publication, tag, release, DOI, Zenodo, archive, or scientific authority; overall release status remains NO_GO, and no second recovery is permitted.
